name: Steve Gadd
description: American jazz drummer, percussionist and session musician (born 1945)
abstract: Stephen Kendall Gadd (born April 9, 1945) is an American drummer and session musician. Gadd is one of the best-known and most highly regarded session and studio drummers in the industry, recognized by his induction into the Modern Drummer Hall of Fame in 1984.

concerts.label: An Evening with Jon Lucien, featuring Special Guests Stanley Turrentine and George Benson
Kool Super Nights: Chick Corea Quartet with Special Guest Dizzy Gillespie
Mikarimba Madness with Gadd and Gomez
Mika Yoshida, Marimba, and Richard Stoltzman, Clarinet

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: Steve Gadd, Eddie Gomez, Michael Brecker. And then Eliane Elias joined and Peter Erskine joined, because Steve was busy with something else.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Marini
about_quotes.evidence: playing with James Taylor’s band night to night, Larry Goldings, Michael Landau, Steve Gadd, Jimmy Johnson, Walt Fowler... Gadd and I talk about this a lot.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Marini interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 15, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: Rhythm section: Steve Gadd, Tony Levin on bass, Richard Tee on piano, Hugh McCracken on guitar. We did sixteen takes in a three hour session.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Gap Mangione
about_quotes.evidence: I have the good fortune to have Steve Gadd come and play most of them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gap Mangione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Wesley
about_quotes.evidence: I remember Steve Gadd would play stuff that if you never thought to write, but he would just play things you know with the bass player... But he’d ask me, say, “Well where are the changes?” I’d say, “There are no changes here.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Wesley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 21, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: Well a lot of the young drummers... Steve Gadd... are composing and writing... I’ve always wanted to do this, it’s a salute honoring twelve great drummers... Steve Gadd are the new guys
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
